scripts.dev: concurrently --names backend,web --prefix-colors blue,green "cd backend && bun run dev" "cd web && bun run dev"
scripts.typecheck: cd shared && bun run typecheck && cd ../backend && bun run typecheck && cd ../web && bun run typecheck
scripts.test: cd shared && bun run test && cd ../backend && bun run test && cd ../web && bun run test
scripts.validate: bun run lint && bun run format:check && bun run typecheck && bun run test
